subcodes.first_line: ...O thou revered lady!  Thou must raise aloft the banner of Baha’u’llah in London and become so aflame with the fire of the love of God as to rouse and stir every listless soul
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خانم محترمه نامه شما رسید ولی چون در سفر بودیم از شهری بشهری فرستاده شد تا
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
